fix_summary: The implementation correctly normalizes the incoming origin airport code to uppercase in search_flights, which makes origin filtering case-insensitive while leaving other search filters unchanged. The added regression test passed and covers lowercase, mixed-case, and uppercase origin inputs.
approval_reasons: The code change is minimal and localized to the origin comparison in backend/app/services/flight_service.py.
Behavior for destination and other filters remains unchanged in the diff.
The regression test validates the case-insensitive origin behavior against uppercase-stored airport codes.
